_doc: SSoT for Pushover limits + silent-failure rules, verified empirically 2026-05-30; re-verified against pushover.net/api + the April-2026 Pushover blog on 2026-06-11. Consumed by pushover_core.ts (preflight) and referenced by pushover_headless_web_control.py / bash. Update HERE, nowhere else.
quota_scope: PER-ACCOUNT since 2026-05-01 (Pushover blog 2026-04): the 10000/month pool is shared across ALL of this account's applications — the observability fleet's apps draw from ONE budget. Teams accounts: 25000/month. Exhaustion: HTTP 429 on message creation.
ttl_seconds: optional per-message Time-To-Live: message auto-deletes from devices after N seconds. Positive integer counted from API receipt; IGNORED for priority 2; needs device clients >= 4.0. Employ for ephemeral progress/heartbeat notifications so they self-clean instead of piling up.
